data.title: Bright Mountain Media amends credit agreement with Centre Lane Partners
data.description:
• Bright Mountain Media (OTCQB:BMTM) has amended its existing credit agreement with Centre Lane Partners, deferring certain interest and amortization payments for fiscal year 2024, it said in a filing.
  • Bright Mountain (OTCQB:BMTM) and its subsidiaries are parties to an Amended and Restated Senior Secured Credit Agreement between themselves, the lenders party thereto, and Centre Lane Partners Master Credit Fund II, L.P. as administrative agent and collateral agent, dated June 5, 2020.
  • Effective June 30th, 2024, the Credit Agreement was amended for a twentieth time.
  • The principal changes include: (i) Extending the maturity date of the Nineteenth Amendment Term Loan from June 30, 2024, to December 31, 2024; (ii) Changing the repayment of the Nineteenth Amendment Term Loan so that commencing September 30, the company commences repayment by making four monthly payments of principal and interest with the balance payable on December 31, 2024.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Dianthus Therapeutics GAAP EPS of -$0.51 beats by $0.04
data.description:
• Dianthus Therapeutics press release (NASDAQ:DNTH): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$0.51 beats by $0.04.
  • Cash Position - $360.7 million of cash, cash equivalents and short-term investments as of June 30, 2024 is projected to provide runway into the second half of 2027.

data.title: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals GAAP EPS of -$0.88 beats by $0.08, revenue of $40.81M beats by $8.76M
data.description:
• Tarsus Pharmaceuticals press release (NASDAQ:TARS): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$0.88 beats by $0.08.
  • Revenue of $40.81M beats by $8.76M.
  • As of June 30, 2024, cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were $323.6 million, which includes the receipt of approximately $39.6 million of net proceeds from an initial draw on our new credit facility in April 2024.

data.title: 4D Molecular Therapeutics GAAP EPS of -$0.63 beats by $0.06, revenue of $0.01M misses by $0.68M
data.description:
• 4D Molecular Therapeutics press release (NASDAQ:FDMT): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$0.63 beats by $0.06.
  • Revenue of $0.005M (vs. $0.24M a year ago quarter) misses by $0.68M.
  • Cash and cash equivalents and marketable securities were $578 million as of June 30, 2024, as compared to $299 million as of December 31, 2023.
  • "We currently expect cash and cash equivalents to be sufficient to fund operations into the first half of 2027."

data.title: TELUS prices $700M debt offering via issuance of senior notes due 2031
data.description:
• TELUS (NYSE:TU) on Thursday, said that it has priced $700 million of senior unsecured notes with 7-year maturity.
  • The 4.65% notes, Series CAQ, were priced at $99.911 per $100 principal amount for an effective yield of 4.665% per annum until maturity, and will mature on August 13, 2031.
  • The offering's net proceeds will be utilized to repay outstanding debts, including commercial paper, and the reduction of cash outstanding under an arm's length securitization trust, allowing an affiliate of TELUS to borrow against trade and unbilled customer finance receivables, and for other general corporate purposes.
  • The notes are offered through a syndicate of agents led by BMO Capital Markets, CIBC Capital Markets and RBC Capital Markets.
  • The closing of the offering is expected to occur on or about August 13, 2024.

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics stock slides after pricing stock offering to raise $60 million
data.description:
• Zevra Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ZVRA) has announced the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 9.23 million shares of its common stock at $6.50 per share, for total gross proceeds of approximately $60.0 million.
  • All the common stock is being offered by Zevra.
  • The offering is expected to close on August 12, 2024.
  • In addition, Zevra has granted the underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 1.38 million shares of its common stock at the public offering price.
  • ZVRA stock fell 11.1% to $6.57 after-hours on Thursday.

data.title: Repay misses top-line and bottom-line estimates; reaffirms FY24 outlook
data.description:
• Repay press release (NASDAQ:RPAY): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$0.04 misses by $0.01.
  • Revenue of $74.9M (+4.3% Y/Y) misses by $1.21M.

  • REPAY reiterates its previously provided outlook for full year 2024, as shown below.

    Full Year 2024 Outlook

    Revenue

    $314 - 320 million vs. consensus of $319.19M

    Gross Profit

    $245 - 250 million

    Adjusted EBITDA

    $139 - 142 million

    Free Cash Flow Conversion

    ~ 60%

data.title: Innodata Isogen beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; raises FY24 revenue outlook
data.description:
• Innodata Isogen press release (NASDAQ:INOD): Q2 GAAP EPS of $0.00 beats by $0.09.
  • Revenue of $32.6M (+65.5% Y/Y) beats by $5.01M.
  • As of June 30, 2024, cash balances were $16.5 million, up from $13.8 million at the end of 2023.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $2.8 million, an increase of 76% year-over-year.

  • Raise guidance to 60% or more revenue growth in 2024.
